data.name: Witch College
data.detailed_description:
Witch College is a charming and magical story about a young man who must ask a girl to a Halloween Dance. When a new girl comes to the school, weird things start happening and he suspects she may be an ancient legendary witch who is trying to seduce him.

  • Different endings depending on your choices.
  • Charming and unique characters.
  • More than 20 beautiful scenes.
  • Erotic content.
  • Non linear story.
data.about_the_game:
Witch College is a charming and magical story about a young man who must ask a girl to a Halloween Dance. When a new girl comes to the school, weird things start happening and he suspects she may be an ancient legendary witch who is trying to seduce him.

  • Different endings depending on your choices.

  • Erotic content.
  • Non linear story.
data.short_description: Unravel the mystery of the Sunflower Witch.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
